name: OpenClaw Memory Stack
description: Rule-based memory router with BM25 + vector search (QMD) and git-based recall (Total Recall). Saves tokens by providing precise memory retrieval.

routerMode.description: Which backends to use. 'auto' lets the router decide.

autoRecall.description: Inject relevant memories before each agent turn.

autoCapture.description: Store conversation context after each turn.

maxRecallResults.description: Maximum memories to inject per turn.
